tasks.text: Scale winning brokering vertical, kill non-performers

tasks.detail:
Raw, authentic BTS content.
Show real-time upvote count, comments, reactions.

tasks.text: Reply to 50+ accounts across all platforms (all-engagement mode)
tasks.detail:
All-engagement mode. Every platform.
Secondary accounts amplify: quote-tweet launch with unique congratulatory takes.
DM 20 people who upvoted/commented thanking them.
Time: 60 min.
